---
name: Bug report
about: Report a markdown document that parses or renders incorrectly
---

## Failing input

Attach or paste the markdown file (or a minimal snippet) that triggers
the bug.

## Expected output

What HTML/AST should this have produced?

## Actual output

What did it actually produce (including any error/crash/hang)?

## Mojo version

Output of `mojo --version`.
